thinking.text: The task is complete. The key seeds (68e63, 62571, 1f61c, b74a5) were recovered via a meet-in-the-middle attack on the FEAL variant. All 100 ciphertexts from /app/ciphertexts.txt have been decrypted to /app/plaintexts.txt. Verification confirms correctness: (1) decrypting known ciphertexts from pairs.txt yields matching plaintexts; (2) re-encrypting plaintexts with feal reproduces the ciphertexts; (3) a cross-check on the last ciphertext matches. I can now finalize the task.
